title: Distibution of values of higher derivatives of $L'(s,χ)/L(s,χ)$
abstract: In this article we study the value distribution theory for the first derivative of the logarithmic derivative of Dirichlet $L$-functions, generalizing certain results of Ihara, Matsumoto et. al. related to ``$M$-functions" for $σ= $ Re$(s) > 1$. We then discuss how things evolve for higher derivatives.
